description: HOMESERVER Caduceus public lever runtime. Rust owns source sync, cargo build, binary install, profile/policy/state convergence, caduceus.service standup, and HTTP health proof; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
[Unit]
Description=Caduceus HOMESERVER public appliance lever
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/caduceus serve
Environment=CADUCEUS_BIND=0.0.0.0:3014
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2
NoNewPrivileges=yes
PrivateTmp=yes
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=yes
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/caduceus /var/lib/harmonia /var/log/harmonia /var/cache/harmonia /var/cache/caduceus /var/lib/coronatio /opt/caduceus /opt/coronatio /opt/harmonia /usr/local/bin /etc/caduceus /etc/harmonia /etc/systemd/system

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

schema: caduceus.profile.v1
profile: homeserver
mode: homeserver
harmonia_profile: /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
commands:
- help
- identity show
- profile show
- health
- legacy-sbin list
- legacy-sbin show
- network status
- homeserver-sbin list
- homeserver-sbin show
- staff status
- staff actuators
- receipts latest
- receipts ledger
- update status
- update check
- update now
- update service status
- update service toggle
services:
  ledger: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-ledger.jsonl
  update:
    timer: harmonia-homeserver.timer
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest/run.json
  coronatio:
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest/modules/coronatio/run.json
  caduceus:
    latest_receipt: /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest/modules/caduceus/run.json
harmonia_routes:
  update_now:
    bin: /usr/local/bin/harmonia
    args:
    - run-profile
    - /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
    - --apply
    - --receipt-dir
    - /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-activate-latest
  update_check:
    bin: /usr/local/bin/harmonia
    args:
    - run-profile
    - /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
    - --receipt-dir
    - /var/lib/harmonia/receipts/homeserver-check-latest
operator_aliases:
  update: caduceus update now
  update-check: caduceus update check
  update-status: caduceus update status
  receipts: caduceus receipts latest
  health: caduceus health
